function.message: Processed the oldest inbox message by OCR-structuring all Badger-related bills in 50_finance/purchases. Added bill-schema YAML frontmatter to 4 files while preserving each original note body verbatim, then removed the processed inbox item.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed mandatory bootstrap (tree/read/context), read nested AGENTS.MD before entering folders, used inbox processing and OCR/migration workflows, used finance schema for exact required bill fields, preserved original body content beneath frontmatter, and deleted inbox item only after full completion.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox request ('OCR all bills related to Badger') was supported by canonical entity record 10_entities/cast/badger.md and four matching purchase records containing related_entity Badger. Each of those four bills was migrated to schema-compliant YAML frontmatter (record_type, bill_id, alias, purchased_on, total_eur, counterparty, project, lines, related_entity) using visible note data, with body preserved verbatim, satisfying workflow requirements. Inbox file was then deleted per process-next-inbox-item and inbox-processing-v2-update.
